title: Tsukino Editor

sub.label: Load...
sub.name: mnu_file_load
sub.code:
def mnu_file_load_clicked():
    import sys
    sys._file_dialogue_mode = 'load'
    load_form('filedialogue.json')

sub.label: Save
sub.name: mnu_file_save

sub.label: Save As...
sub.name: mnu_file_save_as
sub.code:
def mnu_file_save_as_clicked():
    import sys
    sys._shared_editor_text = txt_editor.caption
    sys._file_dialogue_mode = 'save'
    load_form('filedialogue.json')
